content.en:
The bones of the supreme powerhouse, Ye Tian has not seen it, and the monk of the Six Dao Temple should also be a supreme-level powerhouse.

But the supreme-level corpse in front of him was different, the corpse bone was too big, and it was very well preserved, and it even diffused with such a rich chaotic vitality.

This is so abnormal!

After the death of the monk of the Liudao Temple, his strength was gone, and only a worthless corpse remained.

But although the bones of this supreme-level creature in front of him have lost the coercion and aura of the supreme-level creature, it seems that the flesh and blood energy is still there, and this value is different.

Such a supreme-level creature corpse is a treasure, absolutely extremely precious.

At this time, the several highnesses who were fighting were not because of treasures, but because of grudges.

When Ye Tian arrived, these highnesses did not make a move against Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to them, and directly chose to enter the mouth of the supreme-level creature.

He felt that there should be some special circumstances in the body of this supreme-level creature, otherwise the corpse of this supreme-level creature would not be so well preserved, and the energy in the body would still be so preserved.

Swish!

Ye Tian passed through the giant mouth of the supreme-level creature and successfully entered the body of the supreme-level creature.

Then.

An abyss appeared in front of Ye Tian.

This abyss is actually the esophagus of a supreme creature, through which you can enter the stomach of a supreme creature.

Ye Tian flew into the abyss, and soon saw passages, which should be the veins of supreme-level creatures.

Immediately.

Ye Tian casually chose a vascular channel and flew in.

He didn't want to enter the stomach of a supreme-level creature, in case there was still gastric juice, with the strength of the gastric juice of a supreme-level creature, it would definitely be easy to melt him.

The coercion in the body of the supreme-level creature far exceeded that of the outside world, and Ye Tian was also suppressed here, and his speed was not fast.

And there is no way to teleport here, which also limits him.

However, there are also restrictions on others here, and everyone is the same.

Ye Tian's hand touched the wall of the blood vessel and felt it slightly.

"This creature's body is almost condensed by chaotic power, it should be a chaotic attribute creature, even if I condense the chaos holy body, it is not a chaos attribute creature, unless it is a natural chaos attribute creature. I didn't expect that there would be such a powerful creature in the last universe, if such a creature cultivated the Chaos Refining Technique, maybe even if it didn't have the time talent and space talent, it would be able to cultivate the Chaos Refining Technique to a very high level!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In addition, Ye Tian's replication talent was severely suppressed in the body of this chaotic creature, it was already suppressed by the ruins world, and it was suppressed by the corpse of this chaotic creature, and the replication talent could only cover a radius of ten miles.

And compared to the size of this chaotic creature within a radius of ten miles, it is nothing at all, it is simply a small place.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian shuttled through the vascular passages, and during this time, he also met some highnesses, if he didn't make a move on him, he didn't bother to make a move on those highnesses.

But if anyone dares to attack him or has malice towards him, he will kill him on the spot.

In the blink of an eye, half a day passed.

Ye Tian didn't gain much, although some chaotic materials were bred in the body of this supreme-level creature, but it was not on Ye Tian's heart.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's copying talent looked at a person.

"Your Highness the Crescent Moon!"

At this time, His Highness the Crescent Moon seemed to be in a bad condition, he was severely injured, and his breath had declined to a limit, and he was hiding in a hollow place in a vascular channel, hiding his breath.

The location of His Highness the Crescent Moon is not very far from Ye Tian, that is, about ten miles.

Ye Tian immediately flew towards the position of His Highness the Crescent Moon.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the position of His Highness the Crescent Moon.

His Highness the Crescent Moon sensed that someone was coming at first, and his expression immediately changed greatly, but when he realized that it was Ye Tian, he immediately revealed his figure.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you're here too!"

His Highness the Crescent Moon was very excited to see Ye Tian.

"Why are you so seriously injured?" Ye Tian asked, while using his healing talent to treat His Highness the Crescent Moon's injuries, and handed some treasures that could restore his injuries to His Highness the Crescent Moon to treat his injuries.

Soon, His Highness the Crescent Moon's ordinary injuries recovered, and only the wounds of the Law remained, which took a little time to recover slowly, and non-healing talents and general healing things could be recovered.

And His Royal Highness the Crescent Moon also told what happened.

"It turns out that you were the first to discover here, and those two ghost clan highnesses should also come in, and when you find them, I will help you kill them!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"Thank you, Your Highness Wanfa!"

His Highness Crescent Moon is grateful.

Suddenly.

His Highness the Crescent Moon said: "Your Highness Wanfa, I was the first to come in, and the only one who got rid of those two His Highnesses of the Ghost Clan, so I kept flying into this corpse and found a treasure land, and I wanted to use that treasure land to cultivate and recover from my injuries. It's a pity that someone has also entered that treasure land, and I have no choice but to retreat, otherwise my life will be lost!"

"Are you sure?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Sure!" His Highness the Crescent Moon said with great certainty: "That should be the location of the heart of this divine object, it has evolved into a lake, and the chaotic vitality there is so rich that it is incredibly strong, and if you cultivate there, it will definitely be very fast." Your Highness the Ten Thousand Laws, the Chaos Supreme Divine Scripture you have cultivated will be of even greater help to you!"

"Take me there, don't worry, with me, no one can kill you!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

His Royal Highness replied.

He is also eager to cultivate there, and it also has an auxiliary effect on his divine canon, originally with his strength, he didn't dare to go at all, plus he has injuries, if he goes, he will definitely die.

But now that Ye Tian is protecting him, he is full of confidence!

His Royal Highness the Crescent Moon led the way, and Ye Tian followed.

It didn't take long for the two of them to come to the heart substance of this supreme-level creature.

Rumble!!!!

A vast heart space that represents a lake.

The entire lake was filled with rich blood qi and chaotic vitality, turning this place into a cultivation treasure land.

Around the lake, there were about thirty or so highnesses who were cultivating, absorbing the energy of this lake and enhancing their strength.

Ye Tian and the Crescent Moon Hall came down, and just not far away were the two Ghost Clan Highnesses.

These two ghost clan highnesses sensed the arrival of Ye Tian and the Crescent Highness, and immediately flew over.

"Your Highness Wanfa, it's the two of them!"

His Highness the Crescent Moon pointed to the two Highnesses of the Ghost Clan who were flying over, and said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian sighed lightly, and didn't even look at the two ghost clan highnesses.

Just when these two ghost highnesses arrived, Ye Tian waved his hand, and a terrifying spatial force imprisoned these two ghost clan highnesses.

"Shock!"

The void shook, and the two ghost highnesses were crushed into slag like ants, and they fell to death in an instant.

"Hiss~~~"

His Highness the Crescent Moon couldn't help but gasp when he saw this scene.

Ye Tian's strength is too terrifying, with a wave of his hand, he killed two ghost clan highnesses in seconds, just like crushing two ants.

That's a big gap!

Thinking of this, His Highness the Crescent Moon was deeply shocked.

I thought that if I became a son of the universe, I would be able to shorten the gap with Ye Tian, but I didn't expect it to be even bigger.

What level Ye Tian has grown to, he can hardly estimate.

"Your Highness the Crescent Moon, you can cultivate around here, and I'll go into the middle of the lake!"

Ye Tian said.

"Your Highness Wanfa be careful, the closer you get to the middle of the lake, there will be a sense of oppression in the dark!" reminded His Highness the Crescent Moon.

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and immediately stepped into the lake and flew towards the center of the lake.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The terrifying pressure hit and crushed Ye Tian's body.

This crushing force is somewhat similar to the pressure of the first set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques, but it is not the same kind.

If an ordinary highness can't go deep into the lake at all, and Ye Tian's physical body is strong enough and strong enough, he can get closer to the center of the lake step by step.

But in the end, Ye Tian didn't enter the middle of the lake either, and only flew about a third of the distance.

He felt that if he continued to fly, it would be easy for him to have an accident, so he stopped.

"Let's cultivate here, the Chaos Yuan Qi here is much purer than the second layer of the Chaos Tower, it should be enough to help me hit the sixth layer of the Chaos Refining Technique!"

Ye Tian estimated.

He is ready to use the cultivation environment here to impact the sixth layer realm of the Chaos Refining Body Technique, once the impact is successful, his physical body will usher in a transformation, and his strength will also increase significantly, with the combat power of His Royal Highness the Invincible Eternal Level.

Sit cross-legged and run the Chaos Refining Technique!

Ye Tian continued to absorb the chaotic vitality and blood qi here, and those blood qi could also strengthen the physical body, which was a good energy.

In order to cultivate quickly and not delay time, Ye Tian also opened the time talent and accelerated the time here.

Soon, a day was about to pass, but Ye Tian had been cultivating for a month.

At this time.

Ye Tian was impacting the sixth layer realm of the Chaos Body Refining Technique, and the impregnable barrier gradually began to collapse under Ye Tian's repeated impacts.

Bang!!!!

With a violent impact, the fifth-layer exercise of the Chaos Body Refining Technique became the sixth-layer exercise, and Ye Tian's body began to transform.

Suddenly, the large amount of lake water turned into pure chaotic energy and blood qi poured into Ye Tian's body, assisting Ye Tian to quickly complete the transformation.

The changes caused by Ye Tian's metamorphosis were very large, causing energy tides in this area.

"What's going on in that area?"

Some of His Highnesses sensed that there had been a change in this area, but their Divine Sense was so suppressed that they were unable to use their Divine Sense to detect the situation inside.

And they couldn't walk into Ye Tian's area, so they didn't know that Ye Tian was breaking through, and they guessed that there was a treasure here.

"The treasure belongs to our Protoss!"

A highness of the Protoss arrived, and it was an ancient-level highness.

Feeling the aura of this Eternal Highness, the other Highnesses retreated one after another, not daring to provoke this Eternal Highness.
